mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_team( org_id, team_name, team_type, team_intro, service_country_scope, service_major_scope, price_min, price_max, publish_status, is_front_visible, status ) VALUES( #{orgId}, #{teamName}, #{teamType}, #{teamIntro}, #{serviceCountryScope}, #{serviceMajorScope}, #{priceMin}, #{priceMax}, #{publishStatus}, 1, 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.update: UPDATE agency_team SET team_name = #{teamName}, team_type = #{teamType}, team_intro = #{teamIntro}, service_country_scope = #{serviceCountryScope}, service_major_scope = #{serviceMajorScope}, price_min = #{priceMin}, price_max = #{priceMax} WHERE id = #{id} AND org_id = #{orgId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE agency_team SET publish_status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, published_by = #{publishedBy}, is_front_visible = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND org_id = #{orgId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT id, org_id, team_name, team_type, team_intro, service_country_scope, service_major_scope, price_min, price_max, publish_status, published_at, published_by FROM agency_team WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, org_id, team_name, team_type, team_intro, service_country_scope, service_major_scope, price_min, price_max, publish_status, published_at, published_by FROM agency_team WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT t.id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, t.team_type AS teamType, t.publish_status AS publishStatus, t.price_min AS priceMin, t.price_max AS priceMax, DATE_FORMAT(t.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM agency_team t WHERE t.org_id = #{orgId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC, t.id DESC

SELECT t.id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, t.team_type AS teamType, t.team_intro AS teamIntro, t.service_country_scope AS serviceCountryScope, t.service_major_scope AS serviceMajorScope, t.price_min AS priceMin, t.price_max AS priceMax, t.publish_status AS publishStatus, DATE_FORMAT(t.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM agency_team t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.org_id = #{orgId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.id AS memberId, m.display_name AS displayName, m.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, m.job_title AS jobTitle, r.role_code AS roleCode, m.bio AS bio, m.years_of_experience AS yearsOfExperience, m.education_level AS educationLevel, m.special_countries AS specialCountries, m.special_directions AS specialDirections FROM agency_team_publisher_rel r JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = r.member_id WHERE r.team_id = #{teamId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY CASE r.role_code WHEN 'CONSULTANT' THEN 1 WHEN 'PLANNER' THEN 2 WHEN 'WRITER' THEN 3 WHEN 'APPLY_SPECIALIST' THEN 4 WHEN 'VISA_SPECIALIST' THEN 5 WHEN 'AFTERCARE' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END, m.id ASC

SELECT t.id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, t.team_intro AS teamIntro, o.org_name AS orgName, o.city AS city, o.logo_url AS logoUrl, t.service_country_scope AS serviceCountryScope, t.service_major_scope AS serviceMajorScope, COALESCE(SUM(mm.case_count), 0) AS caseCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.success_rate), 2), 0) AS successRate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.avg_rating), 2), 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.response_efficiency_score), 2), 0) AS responseEfficiencyScore, CASE WHEN t.price_min <= 0 AND t.price_max <= 0 THEN '价格待沟通' WHEN t.price_min = t.price_max THEN CASE WHEN t.price_min >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN t.price_min >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min, 1))) END ELSE CASE WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 AND GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), '-', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 AND GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) < 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), '-', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE CONCAT( CASE WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max), 1))) END, '-', CASE WHEN GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max), 1))) END ) END END AS priceTextPlaceholder FROM agency_team t JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = t.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_publisher_rel tr ON tr.team_id = t.id AND tr.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tr.member_id AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_metrics mm ON mm.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN agency_member_role_rel rr ON rr.member_id = m.id AND rr.role_status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND t.is_front_visible = 1 AND o.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND ( t.team_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.org_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.team_intro LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.service_country_scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.service_major_scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND t.service_country_scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{country}, '%')
AND t.service_major_scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{direction}, '%')
AND o.city = #{city}
AND rr.role_code = #{roleCode}
AND mm.service_tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{serviceTag}, '%')
GROUP BY t.id, t.team_name, t.team_intro, o.org_name, o.city, o.logo_url, t.service_country_scope, t.service_major_scope, t.price_min, t.price_max ORDER BY avgRating DESC, successRate DESC, caseCount DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT t.id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, t.team_intro AS teamIntro, o.org_name AS orgName, o.city AS city, t.service_country_scope AS serviceCountryScope, t.service_major_scope AS serviceMajorScope, t.price_min AS priceMin, t.price_max AS priceMax, COALESCE(SUM(mm.case_count), 0) AS caseCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.success_rate), 2), 0) AS successRate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.avg_rating), 2), 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.response_efficiency_score), 2), 0) AS responseEfficiencyScore, CASE WHEN t.price_min <= 0 AND t.price_max <= 0 THEN '价格待沟通' WHEN t.price_min = t.price_max THEN CASE WHEN t.price_min >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN t.price_min >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min, 1))) END ELSE CASE WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 AND GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), '-', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 AND GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) < 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), '-', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE CONCAT( CASE WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max), 1))) END, '-', CASE WHEN GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max), 1))) END ) END END AS priceTextPlaceholder FROM agency_team t JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = t.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_publisher_rel tr ON tr.team_id = t.id AND tr.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tr.member_id AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' LEFT JOIN agency_member_metrics mm ON mm.member_id = m.id WHERE t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND t.is_front_visible = 1 AND o.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY t.id, t.team_name, t.team_intro, o.org_name, o.city, t.service_country_scope, t.service_major_scope, t.price_min, t.price_max ORDER BY avgRating DESC, successRate DESC, caseCount DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT t.id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, t.team_type AS teamType, t.team_intro AS teamIntro, o.org_name AS orgName, o.city AS city, t.service_country_scope AS serviceCountryScope, t.service_major_scope AS serviceMajorScope, COALESCE(SUM(mm.case_count), 0) AS caseCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.success_rate), 2), 0) AS successRate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.avg_rating), 2), 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.response_efficiency_score), 2), 0) AS responseEfficiencyScore, CASE WHEN t.price_min <= 0 AND t.price_max <= 0 THEN '价格待沟通' WHEN t.price_min = t.price_max THEN CASE WHEN t.price_min >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN t.price_min >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min, 1))) END ELSE CASE WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 AND GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), '-', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 AND GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) < 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), '-', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE CONCAT( CASE WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max), 1))) END, '-', CASE WHEN GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max), 1))) END ) END END AS priceTextPlaceholder, '服务内容' AS packagePlaceholderTitle, '该套餐由下方负责成员提供服务，支持先沟通后下单。' AS packagePlaceholderDesc FROM agency_team t JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = t.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_publisher_rel tr ON tr.team_id = t.id AND tr.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tr.member_id AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_metrics mm ON mm.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = m.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'AGENT_REAL_NAME' LEFT JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = m.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'AGENT_EDUCATION' WHERE t.id = #{teamId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND t.is_front_visible = 1 AND o.status = 'ACTIVE' AND o.verification_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PENDING') AND ( (vrn.status = 'APPROVED' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED') OR m.verified_badge_status = 'APPROVED' OR m.id IS NULL ) GROUP BY t.id, t.team_name, t.team_type, t.team_intro, o.org_name, o.city, t.service_country_scope, t.service_major_scope, t.price_min, t.price_max LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.id AS memberId, m.display_name AS displayName, m.job_title AS jobTitle, tr.role_code AS roleCode, m.bio AS bio, m.special_countries AS specialCountries, m.special_directions AS specialDirections, m.years_of_experience AS yearsOfExperience, m.education_level AS educationLevel FROM agency_team_publisher_rel tr JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tr.member_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = m.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'AGENT_REAL_NAME' LEFT JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = m.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'AGENT_EDUCATION' WHERE tr.team_id = #{teamId} AND tr.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( (vrn.status = 'APPROVED' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED') OR m.verified_badge_status = 'APPROVED' ) ORDER BY CASE tr.role_code WHEN 'CONSULTANT' THEN 1 WHEN 'PLANNER' THEN 2 WHEN 'WRITER' THEN 3 WHEN 'APPLY_SPECIALIST' THEN 4 WHEN 'VISA_SPECIALIST' THEN 5 WHEN 'AFTERCARE' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END, memberId ASC
